Query.tables: AEA CT CPR1 P1 PR1 CPR2 P2 PR2 C
Query.SQL: SELECT AEA.AE_NUMBER AS "AEA.AE_NUMBER", AEA.ISSUING_CRT_CODE AS "AEA.ISSUING_CRT_CODE", AEA.AE_TYPE AS "AEA.AE_TYPE", AEA.AMOUNT_OF_AE_CURRENCY AS "AEA.AMOUNT_OF_AE_CURRENCY", AEA.CASE_NUMBER AS "AEA.CASE_NUMBER", C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE AS "C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE", AEA.NORMAL_DEDUCTION_PERIOD AS "AEA.NORMAL_DEDUCTION_PERIOD", AEA.NORMAL_DEDUCTION_RATE AS "AEA.NORMAL_DEDUCTION_RATE", AEA.PARTY_AGAINST_CASE_PARTY_NO AS "AEA.PARTY_AGAINST_CASE_PARTY_N", AEA.PARTY_AGAINST_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AS "AEA.PARTY_AGAINST_PARTY_R_CODE", AEA.PARTY_FOR_CASE_PARTY_NO AS "AEA.PARTY_FOR_CASE_PARTY_NO", AEA.PARTY_FOR_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AS "AEA.PARTY_FOR_PARTY_ROLE_CODE", AEA.PROTECTED_EARNINGS_PERIOD AS "AEA.PROTECTED_EARNINGS_PERIOD", AEA.PROTECTED_EARNINGS_RATE AS "AEA.PROTECTED_EARNINGS_RATE", AEA.CAPS_SEQUENCE AS "AEA.CAPS_SEQUENCE", CT.NAME AS "CT.NAME", P1.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "P1.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME", P2.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "P2.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME", PR1.PARTY_ROLE_DESCRIPTION AS "PR1.PARTY_ROLE_DESCRIPTION", PR2.PARTY_ROLE_DESCRIPTION AS "PR2.PARTY_ROLE_DESCRIPTION", (SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') FROM OBLIGATIONS OB WHERE OB.CASE_NUMBER = AEA.CASE_NUMBER AND OB.EVENT_SEQ IS NULL AND OB.DELETE_FLAG = 'N') AS "OB.ACTIVE_OBLIGATIONS", (SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') FROM OBLIGATIONS OB WHERE OB.CASE_NUMBER = AEA.CASE_NUMBER AND OB.EVENT_SEQ IS NULL AND OB.DELETE_FLAG = 'Y') AS "OB.DELETED_OBLIGATIONS", (SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'N','Y') FROM CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR WHERE CPR.CASE_NUMBER = AEA.CASE_NUMBER AND NVL(CPR.WELSH_INDICATOR,'N') = 'Y') AS "C.WELSH_PARTIES", (SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'N','Y') FROM PARTIES EMP WHERE EMP.PARTY_ID = NVL(AEA.DEBTORS_EMPLOYERS_PARTY_ID,0) AND NVL(EMP.WELSH_INDICATOR,'N') = 'Y') AS "C.WELSH_EMPLOYER", (SELECT DECODE( COUNT(*), 0 , 'false', 'true') FROM WARRANTS W WHERE W.CASE_NUMBER = AEA.CASE_NUMBER AND W.CURRENTLY_OWNED_BY = C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE AND ((W.WARRANT_ID NOT IN ( SELECT WR.WARRANT_ID FROM WARRANT_RETURNS WR, RETURN_CODES RC WHERE WR.WARRANT_ID = W.WARRANT_ID AND WR.DEFENDANT_ID = 1 AND WR.ERROR_INDICATOR IS NOT NULL AND WR.ERROR_INDICATOR != 'Y' AND RC.RETURN_CODE = WR.RETURN_CODE AND RC.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = WR.RETURN_CODE_COURT_CODE AND RC.RETURN_TYPE = 'F' ) ) OR ( W.DEFENDANT2 IS NOT NULL AND W.WARRANT_ID NOT IN ( SELECT WR.WARRANT_ID FROM WARRANT_RETURNS WR, RETURN_CODES RC WHERE WR.WARRANT_ID = W.WARRANT_ID AND WR.DEFENDANT_ID = 2 AND WR.ERROR_INDICATOR IS NOT NULL AND WR.ERROR_INDICATOR != 'Y' AND RC.RETURN_CODE = WR.RETURN_CODE AND RC.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = WR.RETURN_CODE_COURT_CODE AND RC.RETURN_TYPE = 'F' )))) AS "W.IS_OUTSTANDING", (SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') FROM AE_APPLICATIONS AEA2 WHERE AEA2.AE_NUMBER = AEA.AE_NUMBER AND AEA2.PROTECTED_EARNINGS_PERIOD IS NOT NULL) AS "AEA2.PER_RATE_EXISTS", (SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') FROM GIVEN_ADDRESSES GA WHERE GA.CASE_NUMBER = AEA.CASE_NUMBER AND GA.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = AEA.PARTY_AGAINST_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND GA.CASE_PARTY_NO = AEA.PARTY_AGAINST_CASE_PARTY_NO AND GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'SUBSERV') AS "GA.IS_SERV_ADDRESS", (SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') FROM PAYMENTS PY WHERE PY.SUBJECT_NO = AEA.AE_NUMBER AND PY.PAYMENT_FOR = 'AE') AS "PY.PAYMENTS_EXIST", (SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') FROM AE_PER_ITEMS API WHERE API.AE_NUMBER = AEA.AE_NUMBER) AS "API.AEPERITEMS_EXIST", ( AEA.PARTY_AGAINST_PARTY_ROLE_CODE || '_' || AEA.PARTY_AGAINST_CASE_PARTY_NO ) AS "P1.PARTY_KEY", ( AEA.PARTY_FOR_PARTY_ROLE_CODE || '_' || AEA.PARTY_FOR_CASE_PARTY_NO ) AS "P2.PARTY_KEY", (SELECT CRC.RV_IIT_CODE_1 FROM CCBC_REF_CODES CRC WHERE CRC.RV_LOW_VALUE = C.CASE_TYPE AND CRC.RV_DOMAIN IN ('CURRENT_CASE_TYPE','CASE_TYPE_OBSOLETE_BY_IIT')) AS "C.JURISDICTION", (SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') FROM CASE_PARTY_ROLES CAPR WHERE CAPR.CASE_NUMBER = AEA.CASE_NUMBER AND NVL(CAPR.CONFIDENTIAL,'N') = 'Y') AS "C.CONFIDENTIAL", REF.RV_MEANING AS "REF.RV_MEANING", P1.ORA_ROWSCN AS "P1_ORA_ROWSCN", PR1.ORA_ROWSCN AS "PR1_ORA_ROWSCN", AEA.ORA_ROWSCN AS "AEA_ORA_ROWSCN", CPR1.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CPR1_ORA_ROWSCN", PR2.ORA_ROWSCN AS "PR2_ORA_ROWSCN", P2.ORA_ROWSCN AS "P2_ORA_ROWSCN", CPR2.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CPR2_ORA_ROWSCN", CT.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CT_ORA_ROWSCN", C.ORA_ROWSCN AS "C.ORA_ROWSCN" FROM PARTIES P1, PARTY_ROLES PR1, AE_APPLICATIONS AEA, CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR1, PARTY_ROLES PR2, PARTIES P2, CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR2, COURTS CT, CCBC_REF_CODES REF, CASES C WHERE AEA.AE_NUMBER = ${param.aeNumber} AND C.CASE_NUMBER = AEA.CASE_NUMBER AND CT.CODE = C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE AND CPR1.CASE_NUMBER = AEA.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR1.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = AEA.PARTY_AGAINST_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPR1.CASE_PARTY_NO = AEA.PARTY_AGAINST_CASE_PARTY_NO AND P1.PARTY_ID = CPR1.PARTY_ID AND PR1.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = CPR1.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPR2.CASE_NUMBER = AEA.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR2.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = AEA.PARTY_FOR_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPR2.CASE_PARTY_NO = AEA.PARTY_FOR_CASE_PARTY_NO AND P2.PARTY_ID = CPR2.PARTY_ID AND PR2.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = CPR2.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND REF.RV_DOMAIN = 'AE_TYPE' AND REF.RV_LOW_VALUE = AEA.AE_TYPE

Query.Join: H.CASE_NUMBER = ${AEA.CASE_NUMBER} AND ( H.HRG_DATE > SYSDATE OR H.HRG_DATE = SYSDATE ) AND H.HRG_OUTCOME IS NULL AND H.HRG_TYPE IN (SELECT RV_LOW_VALUE FROM CCBC_REF_CODES REF WHERE REF.RV_DOMAIN = 'CURRENT_HRG_TYPE_AE')

LinkedSQL.SQL: SELECT AE_AE_EVENT_SEQ AS "AE.AE_EVENT_SEQ" , AE_AE_NUMBER AS "AE.AE_NUMBER" , AE_BAILIFF_IDENTIFIER AS "AE.BAILIFF_IDENTIFIER" , AE_CASE_EVENT_SEQ AS "AE.CASE_EVENT_SEQ" , AE_DATE_ENTERED AS "AE.DATE_ENTERED" , AE_DETAILS AS "AE.DETAILS" , AE_ERROR_INDICATOR AS "AE.ERROR_INDICATOR" , AE_EVENT_DATE AS "AE.EVENT_DATE" , AE_ISSUE_STAGE AS "AE.ISSUE_STAGE" , AE_PROCESS_DATE AS "AE.PROCESS_DATE" , AE_SERVICE_DATE AS "AE.SERVICE_DATE" , AE_SERVICE_STATUS AS "AE.SERVICE_STATUS" , AE_STD_EVENT_ID AS "AE.STD_EVENT_ID" , AE_USERNAME AS "AE.USERNAME" , AE_USERALIAS AS "AE.USERALIAS" , SE_CATEGORY AS "SE.CATEGORY" , SE_DESCRIPTION AS "SE.DESCRIPTION" , SE_EDIT_DETAILS AS "SE.EDIT_DETAILS" , SE_STATUS AS "STATUS" , REF2_OBSOLETE AS "REF2.OBSOLETE" , AE_ORA_ROWSCN AS "AE_ORA_ROWSCN" , SE_ORA_ROWSCN AS "SE_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY AE.ERROR_INDICATOR , AE.AE_EVENT_SEQ DESC) AS R , AE.AE_EVENT_SEQ AS "AE_AE_EVENT_SEQ" , AE.AE_NUMBER AS "AE_AE_NUMBER" , AE.BAILIFF_IDENTIFIER AS "AE_BAILIFF_IDENTIFIER" , AE.CASE_EVENT_SEQ AS "AE_CASE_EVENT_SEQ" , AE.DATE_ENTERED AS "AE_DATE_ENTERED" , AE.DETAILS AS "AE_DETAILS" , AE.ERROR_INDICATOR AS "AE_ERROR_INDICATOR" , AE.EVENT_DATE AS "AE_EVENT_DATE" , AE.ISSUE_STAGE AS "AE_ISSUE_STAGE" , AE.PROCESS_DATE AS "AE_PROCESS_DATE" , AE.SERVICE_DATE AS "AE_SERVICE_DATE" , AE.SERVICE_STATUS AS "AE_SERVICE_STATUS" , AE.STD_EVENT_ID AS "AE_STD_EVENT_ID" , AE.USERNAME AS "AE_USERNAME" , ( SELECT NVL(DU.USER_SHORT_NAME, '') FROM DCA_USER DU WHERE DU.USER_ID = AE.USERNAME ) AS "AE_USERALIAS" , SE.CATEGORY AS "SE_CATEGORY" , SE.DESCRIPTION AS "SE_DESCRIPTION" , SE.EDIT_DETAILS AS "SE_EDIT_DETAILS" , '0' AS "SE_STATUS" , (CASE WHEN SE.CATEGORY IN (SELECT REF2.RV_LOW_VALUE FROM CCBC_REF_CODES REF2 WHERE REF2.RV_DOMAIN = 'AE_EVENT_CATEGORY') THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS "REF2_OBSOLETE" , AE.ORA_ROWSCN AS "AE_ORA_ROWSCN" , SE.ORA_ROWSCN AS "SE_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM AE_EVENTS AE , STANDARD_EVENTS SE WHERE AE.AE_NUMBER = ${AEA.AE_NUMBER} AND SE.EVENT_ID = AE.STD_EVENT_ID ORDER BY AE.ERROR_INDICATOR , AE.AE_EVENT_SEQ DESC) WHERE R < ((${param.pageNumber}*${param.pageSize})+1) AND R > ((${param.pageNumber}*${param.pageSize})-${param.pageSize})

( SELECT AE.AE_EVENT_SEQ AS "AE.AE_EVENT_SEQ" , 'WP' AS "OUTPUT.TYPE" , WO.FINAL_IND AS "OUTPUT.FINAL_IND" , TO_CHAR(WO.OUTPUT_ID) AS "OUTPUT.OUTPUT_ID" , 'Word Processing Output' AS "OUTPUT.DESCRIPTION" , TO_CHAR(WO.XMLSOURCE) AS "OUTPUT.DOCUMENT_ID" , '' AS "OUTPUT.REPORT_ID" FROM WP_OUTPUT WO, AE_EVENTS AE WHERE AE.AE_NUMBER = ${param.aeNumber} AND WO.AE_EVENT_SEQ = AE.AE_EVENT_SEQ AND WO.OUTPUT_ID = (SELECT MAX(WO2.OUTPUT_ID) FROM WP_OUTPUT WO2 WHERE WO2.AE_EVENT_SEQ = AE.AE_EVENT_SEQ) ) UNION ( SELECT AE.AE_EVENT_SEQ AS "AE.AE_EVENT_SEQ" , 'OR' AS "OUTPUT.TYPE" , 'Y' AS "OUTPUT.FINAL_IND" , RO.ORDER_ID AS "OUTPUT.OUTPUT_ID" , OT.ORDER_DESCRIPTION AS "OUTPUT.DESCRIPTION" , TO_CHAR(RQ.DOCUMENT_ID) AS "OUTPUT.DOCUMENT_ID" , TO_CHAR(RO.REPORT_ID) AS "OUTPUT.REPORT_ID" FROM REPORT_OUTPUT RO , REPORT_QUEUE RQ , AE_EVENTS AE , ORDER_TYPES OT WHERE AE.AE_NUMBER = ${param.aeNumber} AND RO.AE_EVENT_SEQ = AE.AE_EVENT_SEQ AND RQ.ID = RO.REPORT_ID AND OT.ORDER_ID = RO.ORDER_ID )
